summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for branding changes from 'QC Auto Compare' to 'Auto Québec'. Verified site title, headers, footers, and all static pages display the new branding correctly. Confirmed contact email uses the correct domain and GTM component behaves properly when GTM ID is empty.

api_connection_issues.issue: Backend API connection refused during frontend load
api_connection_issues.impact: Frontend shows connection errors but branding elements work correctly
api_connection_issues.fix_priority: LOW (doesn't affect branding functionality being tested)

passed_tests: Site title displays 'Auto Québec' instead of 'QC Auto Compare'
Contact page (/contact) header and email use 'Auto Québec' branding
Contact email uses correct domain: contact@auto.canadaquebec.ca
GTM component exists but correctly does not load when VITE_GTM_ID is empty
All navigation links maintain consistent 'Auto Québec' branding
